title: Ubiquiti USW-EnterpriseXG-24 - UniFi Switch Enterprise XG 24
description: USW-EnterpriseXG-24 is a fully managed, Gigabit L3 switch with 24Ã 100M/1G/2.5G/ 5G/10G LAN ports and two SFP28 ports with baud rate 1/10/25 Gbps. In addition to the standard equipment, the switch also has a 1.3" touchscreen for providing system information, temperature, port statistics and much more (24) 100M/1G/2.5G/10 Gbps metallic LAN (2) 1G/10G/25G - 2Ã SFP28 optical port (*Two SFP28 ports do not support mixed speed in 25 Gbps mode. Once one of the SFP28 ports is configured for mode 25 Gbps, others will also be limited to 25 Gbps. SFP28 ports only support mixed speed when all ports are at 1 Gbps or 10 Gbps.) Backup power via SmartPower RPS connector 1.3 " touch screen L3 features Only one row of ports for easier cable management Supported in UniFi Controller from version 6.1.67 The USW-Pro-24 has no web management but is managed centrally by the UniFi Controller with support for the UniFi mobile application and offers an extensive set of advanced switching protocols and L2 functions, including operating mode (switching, mirroring or aggregation) per port. UniFi Network Controller and mobile applications allow administrators to configure and monitor virtually all graphical user interface functions from anywhere This generation of switches supports redundant power supply via a special connector to the UniFi SmartPower unit in the event of a failure of the primary power supply at the switch Device Power cord 19" rack mounts
